indexes.name: documents_embedding_idx
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX documents_embedding_idx ON public.documents USING hnsw (embedding vector_ip_ops)

indexes.name: documents_fts_idx
indexes.definition: CREATE INDEX documents_fts_idx ON public.documents USING gin (fts)

indexes.name: documents_pkey
indexes.definition: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX documents_pkey ON public.documents USING btree (id)

hybrid_search.identity_arguments: query_text text, query_embedding vector, match_count integer, full_text_weight double precision, semantic_weight double precision, rrf_k integer

match_documents.note: No public.match_documents function was returned by pg_proc in this project.
